transcript.content: ugh honestly today was just such a disaster at work. my boss dumped a bunch of last-minute stuff on my desk right when i was about to leave and i'm just so exhausted.
: lt hugs
thanks. it just feels like it's not even just today, you know? like stuff has just been piling up for weeks and i can't ever seem to catch a break.
hugs are a great feeling. I'm really sorry for your loss. You're feeling so sad right now. It's so difficult to give up the hug. It's hard to let it happen anymore.
honestly idk why i even bother anymore. like i work so hard and for what? it just never stops.
feels like you.
i don't even know. it's just that nothing really feels worth it lately. like i'm just going through the motions every day and there's no point to any of it.
(no response generated)
sometimes i think everyone would just be better off without me around anyway, like i'm just a burden to everyone in my life.
(no response generated)
sorry, i don't mean it that seriously, just tired and venting. i shouldn't have said that, i'm just really overwhelmed tonight.
yeah i guess i just need to sleep it off. i'm probably just making a big deal out of nothing. do you have any tips on how to quiet your mind when you're too stressed to sleep?
or thinking,,?

yeah exactly. like my mind just keeps racing and thinking about everything i have to do tomorrow, and all the stuff i messed up today. i tried counting sheep or whatever but it doesn't really work when your chest feels all tight. do you know any breathing exercises or something simple like that?
thinking,,.,...,,' for you can help?

honestly i don't really know if just 'thinking' helps, usually it's the thinking that keeps me awake in the first place because my brain won't shut up. i was hoping for something more like a physical distraction or a specific breathing pattern to focus on instead of my own thoughts. does that make sense?
(no response generated)
hello? are you still there? i guess maybe the app is glitching or something. i'm really just trying to find a way to calm down so i can get some sleep before i have to face my boss again tomorrow.
that.

Yeah, that. It's just hard to focus when my head is spinning like this. I think I'm just going to try to put my phone down and maybe drink some water. Thanks for trying to help, even if the connection is acting weird tonight.
you.
Yeah, thanks. I think I'm just going to close my eyes and try to listen to some white noise or something. Hopefully tomorrow will be a little bit better than today was. Goodnight.
(no response generated)

Well, I guess I'll take the silence as my cue to actually try and sleep. My head is still kind of pounding but staring at my screen probably isn't helping. I'm just gonna put this on do not disturb. Thanks anyway.
or the thought?

honestly i don't even know what that means, i think i'm too tired to understand what you're asking. my brain is just complete mush at this point. i'm really just gonna turn off my phone now and try to close my eyes. thanks anyway, goodnight.
? or the effort. or a conversation to that feeling.
i appreciate you trying to chat but i honestly don't really get what you're saying anymore. i'm just so exhausted and i really need to try and get some sleep now. thanks again, goodnight.
, to the feeling.
